---
description: Seed the brain with canonical agents (governor, oneiroi, activity scribe). Requires `seed core` to have run first.
argument-hint: ""
---

Run `oneiros seed agents` to create the canonical cognitive agents: governor.process (orchestration), oneiroi.process (self-awareness), and activity.scribe (record-keeping). These agents form the baseline cognitive team.

Requires the `process` and `scribe` personas to exist — run `oneiros seed core` first if they don't.

Idempotent: agents that already exist are skipped.
